company.description: Company or brand name of the inquirer

contact_name.description: Full name of the contact person

phone.description: Optional phone or WhatsApp number with country code

country.description: Country or region of the buyer

product_category.description: What type of product they want to source

target_quantity.description: Estimated order quantity or trial run size

target_unit_price.description: Target unit price range in USD

services_needed.description: Which services the buyer needs help with

message.description: Free-form description of the project, requirements, and timeline

source_page.description: Which page the inquiry was submitted from
